name: metal room
hints: This is an exercise room with alien fitness equipment. The treadmill, ball, and bag are all interactive.
Try using the treadmill - you can WALK or RUN on it. The medicine ball and punching bag can be taken.
GET BALL and GET BAG for useful items. GO TREADMILL or USE TREADMILL to get on it, then WALK and RUN to operate it. The treadmill sequence activates something important.
The treadmill puzzle requires specific actions: first RUN to reveal a T-shaped handle, then WALK to move it. Go NORTH to reach the main corridor.
notes: Exercise room with treadmill puzzle, medicine ball, and punching bag. The treadmill must be operated in a specific sequence (RUN then WALK) to reveal and move a T-shaped handle that activates ship systems. Going through the force field reaches room 10 but sets a flag. North exit leads to main corridor (room 21).
